title: reseda decursiva var. foliosa
intro: Reseda decursiva var. foliosa, also known as the leafy reseda or prickly reseda, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the reseda plant species. It is a shrub-like plant that has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The leafy reseda has been used to treat various health issues, such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin irritations, thanks to its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system and skin. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory and skin conditions.
